title: Automated API Call Chain with Retry Mechanism
scenario: Design an API call chain that fetches customer information and places an order. The API must handle network failures and implement a retry mechanism with exponential backoff. The target LLM output should be a Python code snippet implementing the API call chain.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code
Must use a Python library (e.g., requests, aiohttp) for making HTTP requests

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically correct and free from errors.
The retry mechanism should implement exponential backoff and handle network failures correctly.
The code should be well-structured, readable, and follow best practices.
